# Get the grasp pose for the red cube
grasp_position, grasp_quaternion = sample_grasp_pose("red cube")

# Now move down to the actual grasp pose without additional approach

close_gripper()

# Lift the cube by moving upward in Z-axis by 10 cm

goto_pose(lifted_position, grasp_quaternion, z_approach=0.0)
</python_code>
